### jibo-background
The Jibo API for the background process of skills.

### Installation

```bash
npm install jibo-background --save
```

### Usage

 1. Add the following entry to a skill's `package.json` to indicate your background process' entry point.
  

        "jibo": {
            "backgroundMain": "background-src/main.js"
        },


 2. In your background processes entry point script. Do the following to initialize the Jibo Background API.
  
        const jiboBackground = require('jibo-background');
        
        jiboBackground.init( (err) => {
            // Now the API is ready to use
        });

 3. Documentation (COMING SOON), for now [see the example project](https://github.jibo.com/francois/notifications-test/blob/master/background-src/main.js#L12-L145) that uses each feature of the `jibo-background` module.
